_doc: Reference-corpus metadata (audit 2026-07-12). The corpora themselves are scratchpad-only (see agentic-docs/licensing.md); this file owns their KNOWN LIMITATIONS so the metric can compensate. compare.py matches the reference path against `match` substrings and applies: mask_after_s (truncate both signals — hard release gates tax physically-correct tails), and surfaces the flags in its report so agents fit with eyes open.

corpora.notes: 16 velocity layers, natural decays ~16 s. Trustworthy full-band. Corpus samples every 3rd key only.
BLIND >8 kHz (ultrasonic gate is the only guard). Level-normalized: velocity->loudness curves are FAKE here, fit velocity->timbre only. Hard release gate ~0.3 s after the 3 s note-off: masked.

corpora.corpus: DRSKit + MuldjordKit + NakedDrums (DrumGizmo/sfz) + VSCO-2-CE concert BD
corpora.notes: Close-mic, trustworthy full-band. Concert BD is an openness ANCHOR, not a kit kick: expect structural crest-gate reds against it (slow bloom); pair primary comparisons with the kit-kick refs.
Overhead mics carry room bleed; attack-window axes are more trustworthy than tails.
